PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?trigger WHERE {
  wd:Q200619 wdt:P102 wd:Q747640 .
  wd:Q747640 wdt:P571 ?inception .
  FILTER(?inception >= "2008-01-01" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    wd:Q747640 wdt:P1705 ?movementLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?movementLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
  BIND(IF(CONTAINS(STR(?inception) , "2008") || CONTAINS(STR(?inception) , "2009") , "Icelandic financial crisis of 2008" , "Unknown trigger") AS ?trigger)
}
